title: jasione montana var. glabra
intro: Jasione montana var. glabra, also known as Hairless Mountain Jasmine or Glabrous Mountain Jasmine, is a plant species that belongs to the Jasione genus, a group of flowering plants in the bellflower family (Campanulaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Jasione montana var. glabra include relief from coughs, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and asthma.
